hooks.command: node -e "const cp=require('child_process');const diff=cp.execSync('git diff --cached',{encoding:'utf8'});const patterns=[/AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}/,/-----BEGIN (RSA|DSA|EC|OPENSSH) PRIVATE KEY/,/ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}/,/xox[abpr]-[A-Za-z0-9-]+/];for(const p of patterns){if(p.test(diff)){console.error('Blocked: potential secret in commit');process.exit(2)}}"
